cart.title: Cart workspace from the module package
cart.subtitle: The cart module now owns a storefront cart workspace for cart state, line items, and delivery-group snapshots. Checkout completion still remains aggregate in commerce.
cart.error.load: Failed to load storefront cart data
cart.error.update: Failed to update cart line items
cart.empty.title: No cart selected
cart.empty.body: Open this route with `?cart_id=` to inspect an active storefront cart from the cart-owned module package.
cart.missing.title: Cart not found
cart.missing.body: The requested storefront cart could not be found in this tenant or is not accessible for the current storefront customer.
cart.summary.subtitle: Cart state, identity, and locale/channel snapshot now come directly from the cart module.
cart.groups.title: Delivery groups
cart.groups.empty: This cart does not have delivery groups yet.
cart.items.title: Line items
cart.items.empty: This cart does not contain any line items yet.
cart.items.actions.hint: The cart module can safely decrement or remove line items here. Quantity increases and checkout stay in aggregate commerce flows.
